name: field-notes
description: Transform raw event notes and photos into polished, shareable documents — conferences, trade shows, workshops, site visits, and talks

plugins.name: field-notes
plugins.description: Transform raw, incomplete notes taken at real-world events into polished, ready-to-share documents. Accepts sparse notes and photos, detects event type, fetches official references, researches named entities, and generates elevated Markdown + styled HTML output with embedded photos and research panels.
